summary: All five requirements are substantially implemented. REQ-1 is covered by the updated backend/main.mo Order type and createOrder. REQ-2 is covered by the updated CheckoutPage form. REQ-3 is covered by useQueries.ts updates. REQ-4 is covered by the AdminOrdersManagement component with clickable cards and OrderDetailModal. REQ-5 is covered by the new backend/migration.mo file. One minor gap exists: REQ-2 requires explicit form validation that required fields are filled before submission, which appears to rely solely on HTML required attributes without explicit JS-level validation feedback, but this is a borderline concern. Overall implementation is comprehensive.

hallucinated_features.description: A new utility file frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts was added with URL parameter parsing, sessionStorage persistence, and hash-based routing helpers.
hallucinated_features.reason: None of the five requirements mention adding or modifying URL parameter utilities. This appears to be additional functionality not requested in the build spec.

hallucinated_features.description: useActor.ts was modified to import and use getSecretParameter from urlParams.ts for admin token handling.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly lists frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts as a protected file that must not be modified, yet it was modified in the diff.
